name: browser
description: Browser automation using the space's real Chrome browser via CDP — real Chrome, real fingerprint, real extensions, no bot detection. Each space runs its own persistent Chrome profile launched from the superbot3 dashboard globe icon. All commands must pass --cdp $AGENT_BROWSER_CDP. Triggers: 'open website', 'fill form', 'click button', 'screenshot', 'scrape data', 'automate browser', 'extract from page'.
